title: Yori3o's Grappling Hooks & Copper Age Backport
description: Adds a copper grappling hook to older versions of the game.
body:
Adds copper grappling hooks to [**Yori3o's Grappling Hooks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yori3os-grappling-hooks) mod for compatibility with [**Copper Age Backport**](https://modrinth.com/mod/backport-copper-age). Both mods are required.

Forge 1.20.1 is temporarily unavailable.

You can add your own grappling hooks using this addon as an example, starting with version 4.0.0 of Yori3o's Grappling Hooks.
